meta.dc:title: 119 S 4465 ENR: To amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978, and for other purposes.
meta.dc:creator: United States Senate
meta.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

preface.congress: One Hundred Nineteenth Congress of the United States of America
preface.session: A T T H E S E C O N D S E S S I O N
preface.enrolledDateline: Begun and held at the City of Washington on Saturday, the third day of January, two thousand and twenty six

longTitle.officialTitle: To amend the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 to extend the authorities of title VII of the Foreign Intelligence Surveillance Act of 1978, and for other purposes.

enactingFormula.i: Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representa­tives of the United States of America in Congress assembled,

section.heading: EXTENSION OF AUTHORITIES OF TITLE VII OF THE FOREIGN INTELLIGENCE SURVEILLANCE ACT OF 1978.

subsection.heading: Extension of Repeal Date of Title VII.—
subsection.chapeau: Section 403(b) of the FISA Amendments Act of 2008 (Public Law 110–261) is amended—

paragraph.content: in paragraph (1) (50 U.S.C. 1881 note), by striking “April 30, 2026” and inserting “June 12, 2026”; and
in paragraph (2) (18 U.S.C. 2511 note), in the matter preceding subparagraph (A), by striking “April 30, 2026” and inserting “June 12, 2026”.

subsection.heading: Effective Date.—
subsection.content: The amendments made by this section shall take effect on the earlier of the date of the enactment of this Act or April 29, 2026.

signature.role: Speaker of the House of Representatives.
Vice President of the United States and President of the Senate.
